basic_details.job_title: APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 200 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Transmission Corporation of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APTRANSCO)
basic_details.short_information: Also read: Check All Latest Engineering Government Jobs 2026 – Click Here

important_dates.objection window: Within 7 days of initial key release
important_dates.merit list announcement: 7 days after final key (tentatively last week of September 2026)

application_fee.details: The application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable through the online payment gateway between 30 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. Once paid, the system generates a Journal Number confirming fee receipt - but this does not mean the application is complete. Candidates must finish the full online application after receiving the Journal Number. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

qualification.details: Candidates wondering whether they are eligible for the APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 should check both the educational qualification and age criteria carefully before paying the application fee. All qualifications must be completed and certificates must be in hand on or before the date of notification (25 June 2026). Degrees awarded under Distance Mode through study centers by universities outside Andhra Pradesh are not valid for this recruitment. | Also read: RVUNL Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 2005 Junior Engineer, Junior Accountant and More Posts | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.details: One of the most searched queries around APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 is the salary structure. During the 2-year probation period (within a continuous period of 3 years), selected candidates receive a fixed consolidated remuneration of ₹75,000 per month. After successful completion of probation, they are placed on the regular pay scale under RPS-2022. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The APTRANSCO AEE selection process for 2026 is entirely merit-based

conducted through a Computer Based Test (CBT) with no scope for external recommendations. Any attempt to influence the process results in permanent disqualification. The full process from CBT to appointment involves four clear stages.
Step 1 - Computer Based Test (CBT) The CBT is scheduled from 22 to 29 August 2026 with a duration of 3 hours and a total of 100 marks. The test is conducted in English only
at designated centres across 52 cities in Andhra Pradesh and neighbouring states including Hyderabad
Step 2 - Normalization Since the CBT is conducted in multiple shifts
a standard normalization formula is applied to ensure fairness across different sets. Normalized marks (calculated up to 5 decimal places) are used for merit ranking.
Step 3 - Merit List Preparation The merit list is prepared in a 1:1 ratio against notified vacancies
strictly following the Rule of Reservation and zone-wise local candidature norms. Tie-breaking is done first by age (older candidate ranked higher)
then by the date of acquiring the educational qualification.

Step 4 - Certificate Verification Candidates in the 1:1 merit list are called for verification of original documents. Candidates who fail to produce valid certificates or are found ineligible are disqualified
and the next candidate in the merit list is considered.
Step 5 - Final Selection and Appointment The final selection list is published on the official website. Appointment orders are issued subject to character verification
and fulfillment of all eligibility conditions.

exam_pattern.details: Note: There is no negative marking in the CBT. | Also read: APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 135 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts

how_to_apply: The APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 process is fully online and must be completed through either the official APTRANSCO website or the Common Recruitment Portal before 20 July 2026. No offline applications are accepted. Candidates who submit applications through any mode other than online will be summarily rejected.
Click on the APTRANSCO Recruitment 2026 application link (active from 30 June 2026)
Complete registration using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number - an OTP will be sent to this number
Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 via the online payment gateway and note your Journal Number
Log in using the credentials received after registration
Fill in all required fields - educational qualifications, personal details, zone preferences, utility preferences
Upload scanned copies of required documents (photo, signature, qualification certificates, community certificate, etc.)
Enter your zone and utility preferences - these are final and cannot be changed after submission
Submit the application and save or print the confirmation for your records
Candidates already in government service must upload a No Objection Certificate from their current employer.

all_official_links.label: Download APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online and pay the application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026 at 11:59 PM. No applications will be accepted after this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are notified in APTRANSCO AEE Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: APTRANSCO has notified 200 total vacancies - 167 for AEE/Electrical, 23 for AEE/Civil, and 10 for AEE/Telecom — through this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 42 years of age as on 01 July 2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get a relaxation up to 47 years, and PwBD candidates up to 52 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable online through the payment gateway. The fee is non-refundable once paid.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for APTRANSCO AEE 2026 selected candidates?
faq.answer: During the probation period, selected candidates receive ₹75,000 per month as consolidated remuneration. After probation, they are placed on the regular RPS-2022 pay scale starting at ₹86,245.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks, followed by certificate verification and final selection. There is no interview. Marks are normalized across multiple exam shifts.

faq.question: Q7. When is the APTRANSCO AEE CBT exam scheduled?
faq.answer: The Computer Based Test is scheduled from 22 August 2026 to 29 August 2026. Hall tickets will be available for download 7 days before the exam begins.

faq.question: Q8. Is there negative marking in the APTRANSCO AEE 2026 exam?
faq.answer: No. There is no negative marking in the APTRANSCO AEE Computer Based Test 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed to apply for APTRANSCO AEE 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload a recent passport photo, scanned signature, educational qualification certificates, community/caste certificate (if applicable), EWS certificate (if applicable), PwBD SADAREM certificate (if applicable), and study/residence certificates for local candidature claims.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF?
faq.answer: The official APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF is available for download at https://aptransco.gov.in and https://apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 25 June 2026 onwards.
